raw_text:
CloudVault Technologies

Secure, scalable infrastructure for modern enterprises

Now Hiring: Senior DevOps Engineer

San Francisco, CA (Remote-First) · Full-time · $170,000 - $220,000 USD per annum

W

e're looking for an experienced Senior DevOps Engineer to join our Platform Engineering team. In this

role, you'll architect and maintain our multi-cloud infrastructure, lead infrastructure design decisions,

mentor junior engineers, and drive continuous improvement across our CI/CD pipelines and Kubernetes

environments. You'll work with cutting-edge technologies and collaborate closely with product, security, and

backend teams to scale our platform reliably.

A B O U T U S

CloudVault Technologies is a rapidly growing infrastructure-as-code platform company founded in 2018. We

empower enterprises to build, deploy, and manage cloud-native applications with confidence. Our SaaS

platform abstracts away infrastructure complexity, allowing development teams to focus on innovation while

maintaining enterprise-grade security and compliance. With over 500 customers across North America and

Europe, we're expanding our world-class DevOps and platform engineering team.

Y O U R R O L E

Design, implement, and manage Kubernetes clusters across AWS and GCP using infrastructure-as-code
principles with Terraform

Lead the architecture and optimization of CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions and Jenkins, mentoring

team members on best practices

Develop and maintain Bash and Python automation scripts for infrastructure provisioning, monitoring, and

remediation

Oversee containerization strategy using Docker, including image optimization, registry management, and

supply chain security

Define and implement monitoring, logging, and alerting strategies using industry-standard tools; respond to

production incidents and conduct post-mortems

Collaborate with security teams to implement Infrastructure-as-Code security scanning, policy enforcement,

and compliance automation

Mentor junior and mid-level DevOps engineers, conducting code reviews and providing technical guidance

on infrastructure projects

Evaluate and integrate new tools and technologies into our infrastructure stack; document architectural

decisions and runbooks

Drive cost optimization initiatives across cloud resources and identify opportunities to improve

infrastructure efficiency and reliability

 R E Q U I R E D Q U A L I F I C AT I O N S

5-8 years of professional DevOps, Site Reliability Engineering (SRE), or cloud infrastructure engineering

experience

Expert proficiency with Kubernetes administration, including cluster management, networking, storage, and
troubleshooting at scale

Advanced experience with Infrastructure-as-Code tools, specifically Terraform, for multi-cloud

deployments

Strong hands-on experience with Docker containerization and container orchestration in production

environments

Demonstrated expertise with CI/CD pipeline design and implementation using GitHub Actions, Jenkins, or

equivalent platforms

Proficiency in scripting and automation with Bash and Python for infrastructure operations and tooling

Experience designing and managing cloud infrastructure on AWS or GCP (or both), including networking,

compute, and storage services

Strong understanding of Linux/Unix systems administration, networking fundamentals, and security best

practices

D E S I R E D Q U A L I F I C AT I O N S

Experience with infrastructure cost optimization, resource allocation, and cloud financial management

Familiarity with configuration management tools such as Ansible or Puppet

Knowledge of service mesh technologies (e.g., Istio) or advanced Kubernetes ecosystem tools

Demonstrated experience leading infrastructure modernization initiatives or large-scale migrations

T O O L S  O F  T H E T R A D E

Kubernetes, Docker, Terraform, AWS (EC2, ECS, RDS, S3, IAM, CloudWatch), GCP (GKE, Compute Engine,

Cloud Storage), GitHub Actions, Jenkins, Bash, Python, Prometheus & Grafana

W E O F F E R

Competitive salary and equity package with annual performance bonuses

Comprehensive health, dental, and vision insurance with company contributions

Unlimited PTO and flexible work-from-home policy with access to co-working spaces

Professional development budget ($2,500 annually) for conferences, certifications, and courses

Mentorship program and clear career progression pathways to staff and principal engineer roles

Paid parental leave (16 weeks), adoption assistance, and fertility support

Daily catered lunches, snacks, and beverage stations at San Francisco HQ

T O A P P LY

 To apply, please submit your resume, a cover letter highlighting your most significant infrastructure projects,

and a link to your GitHub profile (if available) to careers@cloudvaulttechnologies.com with the subject line

'Senior DevOps Engineer Application - [Your Name]'. You may also apply directly through our careers page at
careers.cloudvaulttechnologies.com. We review applications on a rolling basis and will contact qualified

candidates within 2 weeks.
